attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	WI_RV.BATCH_ID,
	WI_RV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
	WI_RV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	WI_RV.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
	WI_RV.ACCOUNT_CODE,
	WI_RV.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
	WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
	WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
	WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
	WI_RV.AMOUNT,
	WI_RV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	WI_RV.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
	WI_RV.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
	WI_RV.COGS_PERCENT,
	WI_RV.COMMENTS,
	WI_RV.CONTEXT,
	WI_RV.CREATED_BY,
	WI_RV.CREATION_DATE,
	WI_RV.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	WI_RV.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	WI_RV.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
	WI_RV.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
	WI_RV.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
	WI_RV.EXTRACT_TYPE,
	WI_RV.FISCAL_ID,
	WI_RV.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
	WI_RV.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
	WI_RV.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	WI_RV.GLOBAL_NAME,
	WI_RV.GL_DATE,
	WI_RV.GL_POSTED_DATE,
	WI_RV.GROUPING_ID,
	WI_RV.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	WI_RV.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
	WI_RV.INVOICE_PERCENT,
	WI_RV.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
	WI_RV.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
	WI_RV.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	WI_RV.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
	WI_RV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
	WI_RV.LINE_TYPE,
	WI_RV.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
	WI_RV.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
	WI_RV.ORDER_LINE_ID,
	WI_RV.ORDER_NUMBER,
	WI_RV.ORG_ID,
	WI_RV.LINE_PERCENT,
	WI_RV.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	WI_RV.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	WI_RV.QUOTA_FLAG,
	WI_RV.REASON_CODE,
	WI_RV.REBATE_AMOUNT,
	WI_RV.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
	WI_RV.REQUEST_ID,
	WI_RV.RULE_START_DATE,
	WI_RV.SALESREP_ID,
	WI_RV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
	WI_RV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	WI_RV.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
	WI_RV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	WI_RV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
	WI_RV.SPLIT_PERCENT,
	WI_RV.TERRITORY_ID,
	WI_RV.TRANSACTION_DATE,
	WI_RV.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
	WI_RV.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
	WI_RV.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
	WI_RV.TRX_DATE,
	WI_RV.TRX_NAME,
	WI_RV.TRX_NUMBER,
	WI_RV.TRX_TYPE,
	WI_RV.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
	WI_RV.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
	WI_RV.CREATE_DATETIME,
	WI_RV.ACTION_CODE,
	WI_RV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
	WI_RV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RV_P WI_RV
 WHERE WI_RV.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'CORP_ADJ'
 /*satchinn  Lot2B changes */
 AND WI_RV.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('UO','BO')

SELECT 
WIADJ.BATCH_ID                      	,
WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            	,
WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          	,
WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 	,
WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CODE                  	,
WIADJ.ACCTD_AMOUNT                  	,
WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 	,
WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             	,
WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               	,
WIADJ.AMOUNT                        	,
WIADJ.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
WIADJ.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           	,
WIADJ.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           	,
WIADJ.COGS_PERCENT                  	,
WIADJ.COMMENTS                      	,
WIADJ.CONTEXT                       	,
WIADJ.CREATED_BY                    	,
WIADJ.CREATION_DATE                 	,
WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               	,
WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          	,
WIADJ.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      	,
WIADJ.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               	,
WIADJ.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               	,
WIADJ.EXTRACT_TYPE                  	,
WIADJ.FISCAL_ID                     	,
WIADJ.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG          	,
WIADJ.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE            	,
WIADJ.GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
WIADJ.GL_DATE                       	,
WIADJ.GL_POSTED_DATE                	,
WIADJ.GROUPING_ID                   	,
WIADJ.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             	,
WIADJ.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         	,
WIADJ.INVOICE_PERCENT               	,
WIADJ.INVOICING_RULE_ID             	,
WIADJ.LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
WIADJ.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
WIADJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            	,
WIADJ.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                ,
WIADJ.LINE_TYPE                     	,
WIADJ.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      	,
WIADJ.ORDER_HEADER_ID               	,
WIADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID                 	,
WIADJ.ORDER_NUMBER                  	,
WIADJ.ORG_ID                        	,
WIADJ.LINE_PERCENT                  	,
WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      	,
WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 	,
WIADJ.QUOTA_FLAG                    	,
WIADJ.REASON_CODE                   	,
WIADJ.REBATE_AMOUNT                 	,
WIADJ.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          	,
WIADJ.REQUEST_ID                    	,
WIADJ.RULE_START_DATE               	,
WIADJ.SALESREP_ID                   	,
WIADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID          	,
WIADJ.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
WIADJ.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           	,
WIADJ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
WIADJ.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                ,
WIADJ.SPLIT_PERCENT                 	,
WIADJ.TERRITORY_ID                  	,
WIADJ.TRANSACTION_DATE              	,
WIADJ.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     	,
WIADJ.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          	,
WIADJ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID       	,
WIADJ.TRX_DATE                      	,
WIADJ.TRX_NAME                      	,
WIADJ.TRX_NUMBER                    	,
WIADJ.TRX_TYPE                      	,
WIADJ.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            	,
WIADJ.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           	,
WIADJ.CREATE_DATETIME               	,
WIADJ.ACTION_CODE                   	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                     ,
WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY                ,
WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD         	
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P WIADJ
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC	
	WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,$$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	WHERE WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD
	AND NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
	AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO,$$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	WHERE WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD
	AND NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
	AND NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
	WHERE EST.TERRITORY_ID = WIADJ.TERRITORY_ID                  
	AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME  =WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME    )
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
	WHERE ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID   =WIADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID                            
	AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME =WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	WHERE WIADJ.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
	WHERE ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  WIADJ.SALESREP_ID 
	AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)  
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL,$$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	WHERE WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD
	AND NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
	AND NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
	WHERE WIADJ.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100) 
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_ACCOUNTING EOCAA,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT,$$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	WHERE WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD
	AND NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
	AND NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =NDCAT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
	AND NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT=EOCAA.ADJ_TYPE_ID
	AND EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND EOCAA.ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'REVENUE')
OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL EOCATA ,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT,$$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	WHERE WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD
	AND NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
	AND  NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =NDCAT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD
	AND NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT = EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_ID))

SELECT  
	NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
	NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
	CAST(
	COALESCE(	CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.000000 ELSE
			CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='CORP_ADJ' THEN NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_QTY ELSE 0.000000 END  
		END 
	*
	(
		CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='CORP_ADJ' THEN COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(18,6)),100.000000)/100
		ELSE 0.000000 
		END 
	) 
	,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_EXTENDED_QTY
	FROM
	 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P NCR
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA
		ON (NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD )
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
		ON (SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY )		
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT 
		ON( NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =NDCAT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_ACCOUNTING EOCAA 
		ON (NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT=EOCAA.ADJ_TYPE_ID 
		AND EOCAA.ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'REVENUE')
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
		ON ( EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)

SELECT 
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
CASE WHEN NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' 
	 OR NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' 
	 ELSE NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END DV_REVENUE_FLG,
CASE WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE' THEN (CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END)
	 ELSE 'N'  END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8)='Standard' AND
	NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE  IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y' 
	ELSE 'N' 
	END DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,1,12)='Replacements' AND 
		NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IN ( 'Demo','Evaluation','Int" l Demo','Intl Demo') THEN 'Y'
	ELSE 'N' 
	END DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,	
CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG     ,
CASE WHEN SUBSTR(EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO ,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
	 WHEN SUBSTR(EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
	 WHEN SUBSTR(EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
	 ELSE 'N'   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
'=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  ,
CASE WHEN NSOL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE = 'MAJOR' THEN 'Y' 
     WHEN NSOL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE = 'MINOR' THEN 'N'
     ELSE 'N' END MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
CASE WHEN EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO IS NULL OR EST.TERRITORY_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR EST.HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TEMP	 
FROM  
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P  NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA
	ON (NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	ON (NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT
	ON(	NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =NDCAT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_ACCOUNTING EOCAA
	ON (NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT=EOCAA.ADJ_TYPE_ID
	AND EOCAA.ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'REVENUE')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
    ON(NCR.TERRITORY_ID = EST.TERRITORY_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EST.GLOBAL_NAME)		
INNER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
	ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )    
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
 	ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON ( NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
/*----Open RMA QIFY15 OA---*/
 	ON ( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY)
/*----Open RMA QIFY15 OA---*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL
    ON (NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA
	ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	AND NCA.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')

SELECT 
EXADJ.BATCH_ID                      	,
EXADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            	,
EXADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          	,
EXADJ.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 	,
EXADJ.ACCOUNT_CODE                  	,
EXADJ.ACCTD_AMOUNT                  	,
EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 	,
EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER             	,
EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               	,
EXADJ.AMOUNT                        	,
EXADJ.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
EXADJ.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           	,
EXADJ.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           	,
EXADJ.COGS_PERCENT                  	,
EXADJ.COMMENTS                      	,
EXADJ.CONTEXT                       	,
EXADJ.CREATED_BY                    	,
EXADJ.CREATION_DATE                 	,

EXADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          	,
EXADJ.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID      	,
EXADJ.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               	,
EXADJ.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               	,
EXADJ.EXTRACT_TYPE                  	,
EXADJ.FISCAL_ID                     	,
EXADJ.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG          	,
EXADJ.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE            	,
EXADJ.GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
EXADJ.GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
EXADJ.GL_DATE                       	,
EXADJ.GL_POSTED_DATE                	,
EXADJ.GROUPING_ID                   	,
EXADJ.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             	,
EXADJ.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         	,
EXADJ.INVOICE_PERCENT               	,
EXADJ.INVOICING_RULE_ID             	,
EXADJ.LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
EXADJ.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
EXADJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG            	,
EXADJ.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                   	,
EXADJ.LINE_TYPE                     	,
EXADJ.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      	,
EXADJ.ORDER_HEADER_ID               	,
EXADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID                 	,
EXADJ.ORDER_NUMBER                  	,
EXADJ.ORG_ID                        	,
EXADJ.LINE_PERCENT                  	,
EXADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      	,
EXADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 	,
EXADJ.QUOTA_FLAG                    	,
EXADJ.REASON_CODE                   	,
EXADJ.REBATE_AMOUNT                 	,
EXADJ.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID          	,
EXADJ.REQUEST_ID                    	,
EXADJ.RULE_START_DATE               	,
EXADJ.SALESREP_ID                   	,
EXADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID          	,
EXADJ.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
EXADJ.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           	,
EXADJ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
EXADJ.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                   	,
EXADJ.SPLIT_PERCENT                 	,
EXADJ.TERRITORY_ID                  	,
EXADJ.TRANSACTION_DATE              	,
EXADJ.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE     	,
EXADJ.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          	,
EXADJ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID       	,
EXADJ.TRX_DATE                      	,
EXADJ.TRX_NAME                      	,
EXADJ.TRX_NUMBER                    	,
EXADJ.TRX_TYPE                      	,
EXADJ.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            	,
EXADJ.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           	,
EXADJ.CREATE_DATETIME               	,
EXADJ.ACTION_CODE  ,
EXADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
EXADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD                 	
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P EXADJ
WHERE EXADJ.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT 
AFLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
AAMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    , 
AAMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
AAMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,   
AKEY.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
AKEY.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
AKEY.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT SPLIT_PCT  ,                   
CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,              
CAST(NCR.RULE_START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RULE_START_DTM  ,              
CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' ELSE 'REVERSE' END FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG LAST_RECORD_FLG,         
AKEY.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD    ,    
AKEY.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    , 
AKEY.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   , 
AKEY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'   REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,       
AKEY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
AKEY.SALES_ORDER_KEY    ,           
AKEY.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
AKEY.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
AKEY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,         
NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
AKEY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
AKEY.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
AKEY.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
AKEY.PRODUCT_KEY   ,                
AKEY.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    ,      
AFLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,            
(CASE WHEN (AFLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
   AND AFLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG = 'N' 
     AND AFLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'N' 
     AND AFLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'  
     /*AND AFLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG = 'N'*//*pdubasi: commented the condition DV_CHARGES_FLG='N' as part of Q4FY14 LSS Release*/
AND AFLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y')
THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG   ,        
AFLAG.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG    , 
AFLAG.DV_MISC_FLG   ,                
AFLAG.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,      
AFLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    ,         
AFLAG.DV_SERVICE_FLG  ,              
AAMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   ,   
AAMT.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
AAMT.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  ,         
AAMT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   ,            
AKEY.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
AFLAG.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG   ,       
AKEY.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM    ,      
AKEY.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
AKEY.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
NULL SHIPPED_DT,                  
AKEY.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
AKEY.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
AAMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
NULL INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
AKEY.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
AFLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
AKEY.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
AKEY.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
AKEY.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
NULL CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
AAMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT   ,      
AKEY.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   ,  
AKEY.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   ,    
AKEY.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
AFLAG.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,       
AKEY.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    ,       
AKEY.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,      
AKEY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
AKEY.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
AKEY.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)   DV_FISCAL_DT ,
NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD ,
CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL 
   THEN CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -996  ELSE -997 END
   ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 END  as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(SORR.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,     
NCR.AMOUNT                ,        
NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT  ,
/*---Q1FY15 Open RMA---*/
NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NDCA.BK_OFFER_ATRBTN_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
NDCA.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
/*---Q1FY15 Open RMA---*/
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P  NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
 ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA
ON (NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
ON (NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)

/*---QIFY15 Open RMA ---*/
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
/*---QIFY15 Open RMA ---*/

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_FLAG_P AFLAG
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AFLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AFLAG.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_AMOUNT_P AAMT
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AAMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AAMT.GLOBAL_NAME) 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_KEY_P AKEY
    ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AKEY.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AKEY.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
  ON ( NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR
ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
'ADJ' ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
COALESCE(NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN') ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
'ADJ' LINE_TYPE_CD,
NDCA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
NSO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
/*---Open RMA OA Q1FY15------*/
NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY ,
/*---Open RMA OA Q1FY15------*/
CASE WHEN  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -9999 ELSE -8888 END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CASE WHEN  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -9999 ELSE -8888 END AR_TRX_KEY  , 
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
ESCT.NAME SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
'ERP_ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
NULL CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
'ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -9999 ELSE -8888 END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
NULL PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
NSOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  SERVICE_TYPE_CD,   
NULL GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
-999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,
CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'UO' THEN -9999 ELSE -8888 END AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,           
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD    , 
CASE WHEN  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -9999 ELSE -8888 END RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
ELSALER.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM    
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P  NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA
	ON (NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	ON (NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
inner  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
	ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )    
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
 	ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
	ON( EST.TERRITORY_ID = NCR.TERRITORY_ID                  
	AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME  =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME    ) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
	ON(ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID   =NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID                            
    AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME =NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 	ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
	ON (ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  NCR.SALESREP_ID 
	AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)  	
inner  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
/*---Open RMA OA Q1FY15------*/
 	ON (NDCA.DV_ATRBTN_PARENT_SLSORD_LN_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
/*---Open RMA OA Q1FY15------*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
   ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100)

SELECT 
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
CAST(COALESCE( NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) /100 , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
CAST(
COALESCE((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'CORP_ADJ' THEN
CASE WHEN COALESCE(EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_TYPE,'~') = 'F' THEN
CAST(NDCA.ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
ELSE 0.0000000
END
ELSE 0.0000000 
END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
CAST( 
COALESCE(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'CORP_ADJ' THEN 
CASE WHEN COALESCE(EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_TYPE,'~') = 'F' THEN 0.0000000
ELSE
(NDCA.ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
END
ELSE 0.0000000 END 
END , 0.0000000)
AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
CAST(
COALESCE( CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'CORP_ADJ' THEN
CASE WHEN NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME like 'Invoice Only%' 
THEN 0.0000000 
ELSE (CAST(NDCA.ADJUSMENT_COGS_USD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))* COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
END
ELSE 0.0000000
END
END , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
CAST(
COALESCE(CASE WHEN COALESCE(EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_TYPE,'~') = 'F' THEN
COALESCE(NDCA.ADJUSTMENT_REVENUE_USD_AMT * CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000)
ELSE 0.0000000
END,0.0000000)
AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_RA_P NCR
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  SDCA
	ON (NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID = SDCA.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SDCA.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT  NDCA
	ON (SDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY )		
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT 
	ON( NDCA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD =NDCAT.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_ACCOUNTING EOCAA 
	ON (NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT=EOCAA.ADJ_TYPE_ID 
	AND EOCAA.ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'REVENUE')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
	ON ( EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV 
	ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
	ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_TYPE_ALL EOCATA 
	ON (NDCAT.SK_ADJ_TYPE_ID_INT = EOCATA.ADJ_TYPE_ID)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ADJ_EXT_QTY_P WDNRTEQ
	ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
	AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
